your_book:
A broad risk-on day lifted the book, led by your two biggest software names: ServiceNow (+9.85%) added to its $2,753 stack and NOW sits +3.2% on cost, while Adobe (+4.82%, $3,176) bounced hard but is still your worst large drag at -17.3%. Together ADBE and NOW are ~30% of the account — that concentration cuts both ways. Uber (+5.47%), Lululemon (+4.92%), Samsara (+7.45%) and Rocket Lab (+4.77%) all ran with the tape. The book sits at $19,840 with just $2.49 cash, still -3.41% / -$700 unrealized overall.

Where price and thesis diverge: Adobe keeps falling on narrative (AI-moat fear, CFO exit) despite a beat-and-raise — the model still rates it STRONG BUY at 78 QARP, so today's pop is the numbers reasserting. Rocket Lab is the cleanest mismatch — up 4.77% today but -19.9% held, AVOID verdict, 39 QARP; the price action isn't earning the conviction. Lululemon (BUY) and Boston Scientific (STRONG BUY) carry genuine fundamental cuts — guidance reductions, not just sentiment.

Watch: BSX next prints ~Jul 23 with management guiding flat through Q3; LULU reports ~Sep 4 after its fifth straight Americas comp decline. The pharma cluster (GILD, NVS, NBIX, VRTX) carries an ongoing MFN-pricing overhang.

attention.headline: AVOID rating, -19.9% held, bounced on the tape
attention.note: A 5.5% position your model flags AVOID at 39 QARP — today's +4.77% doesn't fix the broken thesis.

attention.headline: Guidance cut, fifth straight Americas comp decline
attention.note: FY guide slashed on tariffs and stalled China — today's +4.92% is sentiment, not a fundamental turn.

attention.headline: FY26 growth slashed, flat guide through Q3
attention.note: Watchman/EP/urology soft and -7.6% held; next read ~Jul 23 with management already guiding flat.

attention.headline: Top weight still -17.3% on AI-disruption narrative
attention.note: Largest position rallied today but the gap between beat-and-raise numbers and the AI-moat fear is worth monitoring.
